dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.description: Overview of users, requests, and cost metrics

users.title: User Management
users.description: Manage system users, set roles and quotas. Admins have full access, regular users can only use the API.
users.name: Name
users.quotaDeltaHint: Positive to add, negative to deduct
users.passwordCopyFailed: Copy failed, please select the text manually
users.passwordSavedOnceWarning: Plaintext is not stored. Save it to a password manager before closing this dialog.
users.passwordEmptyMeansUnchanged: Leave empty to keep the password unchanged
users.targetUserNotInPage: Target user is not on this page; use search to locate

userGroups.title: User Groups
userGroups.subtitle: Manage user grouping and per-group channel/model permissions
userGroups.createHint: After creation you can configure allowed channels and models on the detail page.
userGroups.name: Name
userGroups.nameLockedTip: The default group's name cannot be changed
userGroups.statusLockedTip: The default group cannot be disabled
userGroups.modelsHint: Leave empty for unrestricted; wildcards like gpt-4* are supported
userGroups.deleteConfirmDesc: Members of this group will be moved back to the default group. Continue?
userGroups.notFound: User group not found or deleted

userPicker.moreHint: Showing first 50, type to search more

tokenPicker.emptyGlobal: No matches. Try searching by name or ID
tokenPicker.moreHint: Showing first 50, type to search more

byokChannelPicker.searchGlobal: Search BYOK channels across all users
byokChannelPicker.emptyGlobal: No matches. Try searching by name or ID
byokChannelPicker.moreHint: Showing first 50, type to search more
byokChannelPicker.crossScopeNotice: Viewing BYOK channels across all users

tokens.title: Token Management
tokens.description: Manage API access tokens. Each token is bound to a user and can restrict models and expiry.
tokens.billingDescription: Track spend and token usage for each API key, then jump straight into filtered logs.
tokens.name: Name
tokens.customKeyOptionalPlaceholder: Leave empty to auto-generate, or provide your own key
tokens.weakKeyWarningDesc: This key may be easy to guess. We recommend increasing complexity. Continue anyway?
tokens.ownerChangeHint: Changing owner only affects future attribution and billing

billing.title: Billing
billing.description: Inspect API key spend and channel cost in one place, with daily rollups and log drilldowns.
billing.adminOnly: Billing dashboards are available to administrators only.
billing.rebuildHint: Recompute daily billing rollups from raw usage logs.
billing.rebuildPickerHint: {count} jobs are running. Pick one to view progress, or start a new rebuild.
billing.rebuildJobLost: Job lost (service may have restarted); please retrigger
billing.rebuildDateRequired: At least one date is required

channels.title: Channel Management
channels.description: Configure upstream AI service channels. Supports 50+ providers with weight and priority load balancing.
channels.sectionBasicDescription: Name, protocol adapter, API key, base URL, status
channels.sectionEndpointsProtocolDescription: Enabled endpoints, protocol adapter rules, per-model overrides
channels.sectionModelsDescription: Model list, mapping, load balancing, test model
channels.organizationTip: OpenAI Organization ID for routing requests in multi-org accounts
channels.apiVersionTip: API version for Azure or Vertex AI, e.g. 2024-02-15-preview
channels.tagTip: Custom tag for channel grouping and filtering
channels.testModelTip: Model name used for connectivity testing. Falls back to /v1/models if empty
channels.autoBanTip: Automatically disable this channel when consecutive errors occur
channels.statusCodeMappingTip: Map upstream HTTP status codes to different values. JSON format, e.g. '{'"502": 500'}'
channels.paramOverrideTip: Override request parameters sent to upstream. JSON format, e.g. '{'"temperature": 0.7'}'
channels.headerOverrideTip: Override HTTP headers sent to upstream. JSON format, e.g. '{'"X-Custom": "value"'}'
channels.forceFormatTip: Convert upstream responses to standard OpenAI format, useful for non-standard providers
channels.thinkingToContentTip: Merge model's reasoning_content (chain-of-thought) into the content field
channels.proxyTip: Route this channel's requests through a proxy. Supports http:// and socks5://
channels.passThroughBodyTip: Skip request conversion and send the raw client request body to upstream
channels.systemPromptTip: Automatically inject this system prompt into every request
channels.systemPromptOverrideTip: When enabled, replaces the user's system message instead of prepending
channels.advancedWarning: These are provider-specific switches. Make sure you understand the impact before changing.
channels.azureResponsesVersionTip: API version for Azure OpenAI Responses API
channels.vertexKeyTypeTip: Vertex AI auth method: json (service account key) or api_key (API key)
channels.openrouterEnterpriseTip: Enable OpenRouter Enterprise response format parsing
channels.claudeBetaQueryTip: Force append ?beta=true to Anthropic API requests
channels.allowServiceTierTip: Pass service_tier parameter to upstream. Filtered by default to avoid extra charges
channels.allowInferenceGeoTip: Pass inference_geo to Claude API for data residency compliance
channels.allowSafetyIdentifierTip: Pass user identifier to upstream. Filtered by default to protect end-user privacy
channels.builtinToolFallbackTip: Behavior when a built-in inbound tool (such as web_search) cannot be expressed in the outbound protocol; applies only to channels using the native codec (not the Legacy Adaptor)
channels.protocolOverrideTip: Force each inbound protocol to a fixed outbound protocol for this channel, overriding default negotiation. Enabled only when 2+ Endpoints are checked. Auto = default negotiation.
channels.protocolOverrideTargetNotInEndpoints: Target protocol is not enabled in Endpoints; check the corresponding Endpoint first
channels.protocolOverridePerModelTip: Matched rule overrides the channel-level config above; model pattern is regex.
channels.thinkingPassthroughTip: For matched models, control whether IR thinking blocks are sent back to upstream as reasoning_content. Useful when an upstream model needs reasoning replayed during multi-turn tool calls. Pattern is regex; first match wins.
channels.thinkingPassthroughOnlyOpenAIChat: Only takes effect when openai_chat outbound is enabled. The current channel does not enable openai_chat — saved rules will not apply.
channels.thinkingPassthroughSendBackTip: When enabled, IR thinking blocks on assistant messages are serialized as reasoning_content. Tool-call assistant messages without thinking will get an empty placeholder. Disable for real OpenAI to avoid 4xx.
channels.disableStoreTip: Prevent store parameter from being sent to upstream. May break Codex and similar features
channels.allowIncludeObfuscationTip: Pass stream_options.include_obfuscation to upstream. Filtered by default for protection
channels.awsKeyTypeTip: Bedrock auth method: ak_sk (Access Key/Secret Key) or api_key (API key)
channels.supportedApiTypesTip: Declare which API protocols this channel supports. Empty means auto-detect from channel type. Used for intelligent protocol negotiation (passthrough when matched, fallback by priority: Responses > Chat > Claude)
channels.fieldSystemPromptInInput: Inject system prompt into user message
channels.fieldSystemPromptInInputHint: For models without system role support; off by default
channels.sectionRequestRewriteDescription: Headers, params, system prompt, proxy, status code mapping
channels.createDescription: Configure an upstream LLM channel: protocol, models, and routing roles.
channels.editDescription: Adjust the protocol, models, and routing for this channel.
channels.endpointPathTip: Relative URL path appended to Base URL. The full request URL is displayed below.
channels.passthroughEnabledTip: When enabled, same-protocol forwarding preserves all protocol-specific fields (reasoning, tool_choice, custom tool formats, etc.) for maximum compatibility
channels.useLegacyAdaptorTip: When enabled, requests are processed via the new-api compatibility layer instead of native codec
channels.manualAddPlaceholder: Enter model names, comma or Enter to add
channels.noModelForTest: No models configured for this channel
channels.agentSelectorTip: Select which agent to run this test on. Leave empty for local test.
channels.agentRouteCreateHint: Save the channel first to assign agent routes

models.title: Model Configuration
models.description: Set input/output pricing per model (USD/1M tokens) for automatic billing.
models.autoSynced: Models are auto-extracted from channel configs. Only pricing can be edited.

agents.title: Agent Management
agents.description: Manage distributed agent nodes. Connected agents auto-sync configuration and process API requests.
agents.tokenGenerated: Enrollment token generated. Copy and use when starting the agent.
agents.enrollmentStep2: 2. Run the following command on the target machine
agents.enrollmentStep3: 3. The node will auto-register and appear in the list
agents.noResults: No connectivity data. Click Check to start.
agents.usageGuideDesc: Route requests to specific agent nodes via HTTP headers
agents.headerAgentId: Target agent by exact Agent ID
agents.headerAddressTag: Select target agent's address by tag (requires Agent-ID or Agent-Tag)
agents.cacheSubtitle: LRU cache runtime status across all agents

logs.title: Usage Logs
logs.description: View detailed API call records including token usage and costs.

playground.title: Playground
playground.description: Test conversations with AI models. Select a model and send messages to see results.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: View your API tokens, usage stats, and remaining quota.
profile.emailTaken: This email is already in use
profile.avatarInvalidUrl: Avatar URL must start with http:// or https://

form.avatarHint: Paste an https URL; falls back to initial on error

members.emptyHint: A routing needs at least one member

tokenTemplates.modelsHint: Supports exact names (gpt-4o) and regex patterns (claude-.*). Leave empty to allow all models.

system.title: System Maintenance
system.dataCleanupDesc: Clean up expired trace and log data to free storage space
system.cleanupHourlyHint: Suggested retention for hourly buckets: 14 days (hour-grain queries only see last 7 days; +7 day buffer)
system.confirmCleanupDesc: About to delete {count} {target} records. This action cannot be undone. Continue?
system.traceMaxBodySizeDesc: Maximum size of request/response body captured in trace data
system.proxyUrlDesc: HTTP proxy for Master to access external APIs (fetch pricing, fetch models, etc.)
system.oauthAutoCreate: Auto-create account on first SSO sign-in
system.oauthAutoCreateDesc: When enabled, unbound SSO identities are shown a choice page to create a new account or bind an existing one. When disabled, only binding is allowed.
system.fallbackSleepDesc: Wait time before switching to next channel on failure (ms), 0..60000
system.fallbackSleepRangeError: Fallback interval must be between 0 and 60000 ms

tokenDetail.empty: This token cannot access any model right now
tokenDetail.errorUnauthorized: This token is disabled or expired

monitoring.title: Monitoring
monitoring.subtitle: Cluster health, traffic and error overview

range.hourWindowClamped: Window auto-clamped to the last 7 days (hour-granularity max)

profile.sectionDescription: Manage third-party providers linked to this account.
profile.alreadyLinked: This third-party account is already linked to a different user.
profile.lastLoginMethod: You can't unlink the last sign-in method. Set a password or link another provider first.

providers.secretChangeHint: Leave blank to keep the existing secret.

byok.title: BYOK Channels
byok.description: Bring your own provider API key for direct billing on your account.
byok.name: Name
byok.baseUrlHint: Leave empty to use provider default

catalog.empty: No models available. Ask your admin to register one.

byok.sheetDescription: Bring your own provider API key. Models must be a subset of the gateway's registered model list.
byok.emptyState: No BYOK channels. Click "New" to add one.
byok.deleteDescription: This will permanently remove the BYOK channel and its API key. This action cannot be undone.

stats.title: BYOK Usage
stats.description: Usage statistics from your private-channel requests. By default, BYOK requests do not deduct your gateway quota.
stats.totalRequestsDesc: Requests routed through your BYOK channels
stats.serviceCostDesc: Quota cost in service-fee mode (zero in free mode)
stats.trendEmpty: No usage in the selected range
stats.chartAllHidden: All series hidden — click the legend to restore

profileCard.title: BYOK
profileCard.descriptionEmpty: Bring your own provider API key for direct billing on your account

settings.title: BYOK Settings
settings.description: Control whether end users can bring their own provider API keys, and which base URLs are allowed.
settings.globallyEnabledDesc: When off, all BYOK creation/use is disabled across the gateway.
settings.maxChannels: Max private channels per user (global default)
settings.maxChannelsDesc: User groups can override this individually.
settings.feeRatioDesc: BYOK costs are multiplied by this ratio (e.g., 0.1 = 10% of admin-channel cost).
settings.systemRecommended: System recommended (read-only, updated with each release)
settings.deleteBaseURLChecking: Checking how many channels use this prefix…
settings.deleteBaseURLSafe: No existing channels use this prefix. Removing it is safe.
settings.deleteBaseURLWarning: {count} existing private channel(s) currently use this prefix. After removal you must still click Save to commit the change; once saved, the next time those owners try to edit their channel the BaseURL will fail validation.

groupCard.title: BYOK (Bring Your Own Key)
groupCard.enabledDesc: Defers to the global BYOK switch by default. Turn on "Use group-specific value" to control it here for this group.
groupCard.maxDesc: Defers to the global per-user limit by default. Turn on "Use group-specific value" to apply the number above.

admin.title: All BYOK Channels
admin.description: Cross-user view of all private channels. Plaintext API keys are never shown.
admin.confirmDesc: The owner will need to re-enable it themselves. Active requests using this channel will fail.

errors.quotaDisabled: BYOK channel quota is disabled by your admin
errors.privateChannelNotOwned: Not authorized for this BYOK channel

range.daysExceedHourLimit: Range exceeds 7 days for hour granularity
range.hourWindowClamped: Window clamped to last 7 days (hour granularity limit)

banner.hourlyDataStartsFrom: Hourly data starts from {date}. Use day granularity for older periods.
